decisions.note: Source says 'Collect samples for microbiological analyses using equipment and techniques described in NFM 7' as guidance; text does not mandate microbiological sampling in the EWI procedure itself.
Source says 'Use CH/DH techniques, as required' — conditional on whether they are required, not unconditional mandate.
Duplicate of C37 with identical intent; C40 is a redundant reference constraint.

References NFM 7 for biological indicators; source text does not attach biological indicators to Step 7 (equipment selection). Step 1 preparation mentions NFM 7 only for microbiological sampling technique, not as a general reference for Step 7.
